Class ProjectComponent

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components.ProjectNode
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components.ProjectComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ProjectComponent extends ProjectNode
A leaf or branch node representing a physical file or a logical Java type. It encapsulates IDE-specific metadata like version control status (badges) and physical file size.
Author:
Anahata
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • fqn

      private String fqn
      The fully qualified name of the Java type. This is null for physical files that do not represent a primary Java type.

    • kind

      private ElementKind kind
      The Java element kind (e.g., CLASS, INTERFACE, ENUM, PACKAGE).

    • annotatedName

      private String annotatedName
      The display name provided by the IDE's node system. This typically contains Git/SVN status indicators like "[M]" or "[A]".

    • fileObject

      private transient org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fileObject
      The underlying NetBeans FileObject.

    • parent

      private ProjectComponent parent
      The parent component in the hierarchy. This is used to distinguish between top-level types and inner/nested types.

    • children

      private List<ProjectComponent> children
      The list of child components, typically representing nested or inner types.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectComponent

      public ProjectComponent(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<?> handle) throws org.openide.filesystems.FileStateInvalidException
      Constructs a new project component from a physical file and an optional Java handle.

      Implementation details: 1. Extracts physical size and filename from the FileObject. 2. If the file is 'package-info.java', it is explicitly marked as ElementKind.PACKAGE. 3. Uses the DataObject/Node API to retrieve the 'Annotated' display name, stripping any HTML tags used by the IDE for rendering badges.

      Parameters:
      fo - The NetBeans FileObject representing the file.
      handle - The optional ElementHandle identifying the Java type.
      Throws:
      org.openide.filesystems.FileStateInvalidException - If the file reference is no longer valid.

  • Method Details

    • addChild

      public void addChild(ProjectComponent child)
      Establishes a parent-child relationship for nested components.
      Parameters:
      child - The nested component (e.g., an inner class) to add.

    • getFileName

      public String getFileName()
      Gets the name of the file associated with this component.
      Returns:
      The filename with extension, or null if no file is associated.

    • getTotalSize

      public long getTotalSize()
      Calculates the total recursive size of this node and all its descendants.

      Implementation details: This method must perform a deep traversal of the subtree rooted at this node, summing the sizes of all constituent physical files or logical components to provide an accurate total byte count for the branch.

      Returns the physical size of this component plus the size of all nested children.

      Specified by:
      getTotalSize in class ProjectNode
      Returns:
      The total size in bytes.

    • renderMarkdown

      public void renderMarkdown(StringBuilder sb, String indent, boolean summary)
      Renders the node and its children into a Markdown representation.

      Implementation details: The renderer must strictly honor the 'summary' flag. In summary mode, it should only output aggregate totals for the node. In standard mode, it must perform a hierarchical traversal, using indentation to represent nesting depth and specialized icons to denote node types.

      1. Renders the component name with a 📄 icon if it is a top-level file. 2. Appends the Java kind and any IDE status flags (e.g., Git [M]) to the name. 3. Recursively triggers rendering for any nested children.

      Specified by:
      renderMarkdown in class ProjectNode
      Parameters:
      sb - The target StringBuilder to append the Markdown to.
      indent - The current indentation string (e.g., " ") for nesting level.
      summary - If true, renders only the condensed/aggregate view.

    • getSimpleName

      public String getSimpleName()
      Resolves the simple name of the component for display.

      Returns "package-info" for package descriptors, otherwise extracts the name from the FQN or physical filename.

      Returns:
      The display name.

    • getComponentType

      public String getComponentType()
      Gets a displayable type string for this component.

      For Java types, it returns the ElementKind string. For generic files, it returns the file extension in lowercase.

      Returns:
      The type identifier.
